title: cleome viscosa var. deglabrata
intro: Cleome viscosa var. deglabrata, also known as the hairy spider flower or hairy spiderwort, is a variant of the Cleome viscosa plant species. It is a flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing pain, and treating skin conditions, as well as having antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. In terms of herbal preparations, Cleome viscosa var. deglabrata can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or ointments for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
